mnemonics.title: Header Files for Directory Functions
mnemonics.content:
MKDIR - My Kitty Demands Immediate Respect (mkdir needs sys/stat.h and sys/types.h)
CHDIR - Cats Hate Dogs In Reality (chdir, fchdir, rmdir, getcwd need unistd.h)

mnemonics.title: Common Error Codes
mnemonics.content:
EEXIST - Directory Already Exists
ENOTEMPTY - Not Empty, can't remove
EACCES - Access Denied (permissions)
ENOENT - No Entity (directory doesn't exist)
ENOTDIR - Not a Directory (path component is file)
